description: Memory bench corpus manifest. The toy fixture is committed; LongMemEval and LoCoMo are fetched into gitignored cache/ by pnpm --filter aura-api bench:fetch-corpus.

toy.notes: Hand-written smoke fixture for wiring checks.

longmemeval.notes: Oracle variant with evidence sessions only. MIT licensed. Fetched on demand.

locomo.notes: Full LoCoMo corpus. Fetched on demand into cache/.
